Dear David,

As discussed in the team meeting on May 17, 2024, your task is to coordinate with the development team to start the initial phase of the new project.

Please ensure you begin the coordination process immediately and keep the team updated on progress.

If you have any questions or need additional support, please don't hesitate to reach out.

Best regards,
Emma Johnson
